open_questions.question: What is the exact ROOT.DSN template structure needed to add additional visible resistor objects from known-good user-created templates?
How are resistor, terminal, and short-wire coordinates represented in ROOT.DSN?
Can a full resistor unit terminal--resistor--terminal be reused safely by editing labels, refs, values, and coordinates?
Can terminals be placed directly on resistor pins, or are short wire stubs required?
What is the minimum valid ROOT.CDB seed for generated resistor circuits?
Which ZIP compression methods and internal file orderings does Proteus accept for .pdsprj repacks?
How should duplicate resistor references and duplicate terminal labels be handled by validator rules?
What controlled one-component tests are required for DC source, AC source, inductor, capacitor, LED, switch, clock, logic probe, and basic 74xx ICs?
